name: AbMPNN
description: Finetuned ProteinMPNN on antibodies in SAbDab and OAS to design CDR loops. Significantly outperforms ProteinMPNN on sequence recovery rate among antibodies, at around 60%.
capabilities: Finetuned ProteinMPNN on antibodies in SAbDab and OAS to design CDR loops
Significantly outperforms ProteinMPNN on sequence recovery rate among antibodies, at around 60%

pdbFile.description: Antibody structure in PDB format for inverse folding

designedResidues.description: Residue positions to design. If not specified, CDR loops are designed by default.
